from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import current_timestamp, lit, to_date

# -------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Spark Session
# -------------------------------------------------------
spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()

# -------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Storage Account
# -------------------------------------------------------
storage_account = mssparkutils.notebook.run('/utils/py_utils_get_storage_account')

container = "odw-meta-db"
table_path = f"abfss://{container}@{storage_account}.dfs.core.windows.net/delta/pln_service_bus_watermarks"

print(f"Path: {table_path}")

# -------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Entity List (your input)
# -------------------------------------------------------
entities = [
    "nsip-document",
    "appeal-event",
    "nsip-project",
    "folder",
    "service-user",
    "appeal-has",
    "appeal-s78",
    "s51-advice",
    "nsip-subscription",
    "nsip-representation",
    "appeal-document",
    "appeal-representation",
    "appeal-event-estimate",
    "nsip-exam-timetable",
    "nsip-project-update"
]

# -------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Create DataFrame with default values
# -------------------------------------------------------
df = spark.createDataFrame([(e,) for e in entities], ["entity_name"]) \
    .withColumn("last_ingest_time", lit(None).cast("timestamp")) \
    .withColumn("ingest_date", lit(None).cast("date")) \
    .withColumn("number_files", lit(0)) \
    .withColumn("status", lit("NOT_STARTED")) \
    .withColumn("updated_at", current_timestamp())

# -------------------------------------------------------
# 5. Write to Delta Table (Initial Load)
# -------------------------------------------------------
df.write.format("delta") \
    .mode("overwrite") \
    .save(table_path)

# Register table (optional)
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pln_service_bus_watermarks
USING DELTA
LOCATION '{table_path}'
""")

print("✅ Initial entity records inserted")

# -------------------------------------------------------
# 6. Verify
# -------------------------------------------------------
display(spark.read.format("delta").load(table_path))
